input.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Safe Build Configuration Script
# Sets up the build environment for the C project

set -e  # Exit on error

echo "==============================================="
echo "C Project Build System Configuration"
echo "==============================================="
echo ""

# Check for required tools
echo "Checking for required build tools..."

if ! command -v gcc &> /dev/null; then
    echo "ERROR: gcc not found. Please install gcc."
    exit 1
fi
echo "✓ gcc found: $(gcc --version | head -n1)"

if ! command -v make &> /dev/null; then
    echo "ERROR: make not found. Please install make."
    exit 1
fi
echo "✓ make found: $(make --version | head -n1)"

echo ""
echo "Build system is properly configured!"
echo ""
echo "Available build targets:"
echo "  make          - Build the project"
echo "  make debug    - Build with debugging symbols"
echo "  make release  - Build optimized release"
echo "  make run      - Build and run"
echo "  make install  - Install to system"
echo "  make clean    - Clean build artifacts"
echo "  make help     - Show detailed help"
echo ""
echo "To build the project, run: make"
echo "==============================================="
